title: rhodanthe manglesii
intro: Rhodanthe manglesii, also known as Billy Button, is an Australian native plant that belongs to the daisy family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Rhodanthe manglesii include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to treat digestive issues and coughs. Herbal preparations of Rhodanthe manglesii include tea infusions and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
